title: selaginella aitchisonii
intro: Selaginella aitchisonii, also known as the Aitchison's spikemoss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its small, green, and spiky leaves. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and skin infections. The health benefits of Selaginella aitchisonii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in certain parts of the world.
